A_value: a spectral wave model developed by ecmwf to simulate surface gravity waves. it computes the evolution of the wave spectrum, including energy input from wind, nonlinear interactions, dissipation by wave breaking, bottom friction.; growth, dissipation, nonlinear interaction coefficients; atmospheric winds, optional ocean / ice modifiers; optional surface currents, sea-ice fraction for wave-current / ice effects
B_value: a state-of-the-art ocean general circulation model for simulating the global ocean, including thermohaline circulation, upper-ocean mixing. in configurations with wave coupling, nemo ingests stokes drift, sea-state dependent momentum flux, wave-breaking tke flux to represent wave effects on currents, mixing.; mixing, coupling controls e.g., langmuir / wave settings; wave-induced fields from a spectral wave model plus standard surface forcing; provides stokes drift, wave-modified stress, breaking-induced tke flux
AB_value: a conceptual loose-coupling plan between a spectral wave model, an ocean circulation model. wave fields e.g., stokes drift, wave-modified stress, breaking-induced tke flux are provided to the ocean, the ocean can return surface currents, sea-ice fraction to the wave model. exchanges occur via files or a coupler at a coarse cadence no in-memory synchronization .; provides stokes_drift, wave-modified stress, wave-breaking tke flux to the ocean; provides surface currents, sea-ice concentration back to the wave model optional
